creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
On Thu, Jan 29, 2009 at 20:59, Sergey V. Dyatko <sergey.dyatko@gmail.com> wrote:

> tiger# portupgrade -f mplayer
...
> [ws] Error in display.
> [ws]  Error code: 10 ( BadAccess (attempt to access private resource
> denied) ) [ws]  Request code: 149
> [ws]  Minor code: 1
> [ws]  Modules: (NULL)

Does one of you have the chance to track this down right now? I am in
the uncomfortable situation of not having access to my FreeBSD boxes
for a while.

Riggs
